## Scope

- [ ] Scope is narrow and matches the requested PR.
- [ ] No unrelated product creep.
- [ ] If tax-related: methodology/docs are updated or referenced.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] Build passes.
- [ ] `npm run verify:pr` passes.

## Forbidden Scope Check

- [ ] No payment.
- [ ] No exchange APIs.
- [ ] No AML checks.
- [ ] No tax filing.
- [ ] No tax payment.
- [ ] No server actions.
- [ ] No API routes.
- [ ] No secrets.
